judge_thought:
Explanation: The question asks for the number of consecutive years Vince Welch was a pit reporter. From the original table, the relevant rows are:
Row 3: 2009 - Vince Welch is listed as a pit reporter.
Row 4: 2010 - Vince Welch is listed as a pit reporter.
Row 5: 2011 - Vince Welch is listed as a pit reporter.
Row 6: 2012 - Vince Welch is listed as a pit reporter.
Row 7: 2013 - Vince Welch is listed as a pit reporter.
This shows Vince Welch was a pit reporter for 5 consecutive years (2009-2013). Row 8 (2014) does not list any pit reporters, so the consecutive run ends in 2013.
